prompt: Solo felt piano, slow 58 bpm, a single unresolved minor figure repeating sparsely with long silence between phrases. Documentary cold open, a question left hanging in the air. No drums, no pad, no swell. Frontline first-20-seconds restraint.

The unease grows steadily as the same trick repeats across both parties. No release yet — hold the tension. No melody resolves.
